title: hyptis alpestris
intro: Hyptis alpestris, also known as the 'Alpine Hyptis', is a flowering plant species in the family Lamiaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Hyptis alpestris can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or essential oils, allowing for easy incorporation into a wellness routine.
